name: LAF Software Reasoning — Source Registry
policy: original summaries; no third-party source vendored

sources.title: LocalAIFactory Software Reasoning Engine V1 — CodeGraph construction from a syntax-only Roslyn extractor
Hybrid retrieval design — exact symbol, substring, graph traversal, deterministic knowledge index, experience memory; embeddings optional
Semantic role inference and transitive impact analysis over typed reference edges
Reasoning benchmark over the real repository (1308 nodes, 1699 edges) scoring above 80% with no model present
